privacy-s1-p1: Kure Pharma ("we", "our", or "us") operates the website www.kurepharma.com (the "Website"). This Privacy Policy, together with our Terms and Conditions and Legal Disclaimer, governs your use of the Website and explains how we collect, use, disclose, process, transfer, and store information you provide to us on or through the Website.
privacy-s1-p2: By accessing, browsing, registering, placing an enquiry, or using any part of the Website, you agree to this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the Website.
privacy-s2-p1: We may collect personal and business information that you voluntarily provide when you contact us, submit an enquiry, register an account, request a quotation, or place an order. This may include your name, organisation/hospital/pharmacy name, designation, email address, phone number, billing and delivery address, GST details, prescription or licence references (where applicable), order details, and messages sent through our contact forms or WhatsApp.
privacy-s2-p2: We may also automatically collect technical information such as browser type, device information, IP address, referral URLs, and pages visited to improve Website performance, security, and user experience.
privacy-s2-l1: Identity and contact details (name, phone, email, address)
privacy-s2-l2: Business and professional details (hospital, pharmacy, clinic, licence numbers)
privacy-s2-l4: Technical and usage data (cookies, logs, device/browser information)
privacy-s3-p1: We use your information to process enquiries and orders, verify prescriptions and regulatory requirements where applicable, arrange dispatch and delivery, provide customer support, send order updates, improve our services, prevent fraud, maintain records required under applicable law, and communicate product or service information with your consent. You may opt out of promotional communications at any time.
privacy-s4-p1: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember preferences, maintain sessions, and analyse Website traffic. You may disable cookies in your browser settings; however, some features may not function properly. Third-party payment, analytics, or hosting providers may also place cookies subject to their own policies.
privacy-s5-p1: We may share information with trusted service providers such as payment gateways, logistics partners, email/SMS providers, and IT hosting partners solely to perform services on our behalf. We do not sell your personal information. We may disclose information when required by law, court order, regulatory authority, or to protect our rights, users, or the public.
privacy-s6-p1: We implement reasonable security policies, rules, and technical measures to protect your information from unauthorised access, improper use, or disclosure. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. You acknowledge that we cannot guarantee absolute security and agree not to hold us responsible for breaches beyond our reasonable control, including acts of government, hacking, or events outside our control.
privacy-s7-p1: Our Website may contain links to third-party websites not operated by us. If you click a third-party link, you will be directed to that site. We strongly advise you to review the privacy policy of every third-party site you visit. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or policies of third-party websites.
privacy-s8-p1: Subject to applicable Indian law, you may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information, or withdraw consent for certain processing, by writing to Kure.export@gmail.com. We will respond within a reasonable time.
privacy-s9-p1: We retain personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes described in this policy, comply with legal and regulatory obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements.
privacy-s10-p1: Our Website and services are not directed to children under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us information, please contact us so we can remove it.
privacy-s11-p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time without prior notice. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the Website after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy-s11-p2: For privacy-related questions, contact Kure Pharma at Kure.export@gmail.com or +91 99119 72234. Registered office: H655+4CW, Balbir Saxena Marg, Yusuf Sarai, New Delhi, Delhi 110049, India.
terms-s1-p1: Your access to and use of the website www.kurepharma.com ("Website") is subject to these Terms and Conditions ("Terms"), which may be updated by Kure Pharma from time to time without notice. By accessing, browsing, or using this Website, you agree that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms, our Privacy Policy, Shipping Policy, Return & Refund Policy, and Legal Disclaimer.
terms-s1-p2: The Website is owned and operated by Kure Pharma, a pharmaceutical wholesaler and distributor based in New Delhi, India, serving hospitals, pharmacies, clinics, and healthcare institutions across India since 2016.
terms-s2-p1: Kure Pharma is a government-approved pharmaceutical wholesaler and distributor of prescription medicines, oncology drugs, critical care medicines, HIV medicines, nephrology medicines, imported specialty medicines, and related healthcare products. Product availability, pricing, and supply are subject to valid prescriptions, licences, stock, and applicable Indian regulations including CDSCO/Drugs & Cosmetics Act requirements.
terms-s3-p1: Where applicable, supply of prescription-only medicines requires a valid prescription from a registered medical practitioner. You acknowledge that:
terms-s3-l1: It is your responsibility to provide accurate prescription and licence details
terms-s3-l2: Substitute or generic dispensing is permitted only where allowed by the prescriber or applicable law
terms-s3-l3: Kure Pharma may refuse or cancel orders that do not meet regulatory requirements
terms-s4-p1: All information on the Website is of a general nature and is not a substitute for professional medical advice by a licensed practitioner. Kure Pharma does not provide medical or health-related advice. You should consult your healthcare provider before using any medicine listed on the Website.
terms-s4-p2: By using the Website, you agree that Kure Pharma has no responsibility to determine whether any medicine is appropriate for you or for any adverse consequences arising from use of any product listed on the Website. Website content is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis and may contain technical inaccuracies or typographical errors.
terms-s5-p1: Prices are displayed in Indian Rupees (INR) unless stated otherwise and may change without notice. We reserve the right to modify prices, refuse orders, or cancel orders due to pricing errors, stock unavailability, regulatory restrictions, or suspected fraud. Payment terms (advance, credit, UPI, bank transfer, card, or COD where offered) will be communicated at the time of order confirmation.
terms-s6-p1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account. You agree not to misuse the Website, attempt unauthorised access, interfere with its operation, scrape or copy content without permission, or use the Website for any unlawful purpose. All Website content is owned by Kure Pharma or its licensors.
terms-s7-p1: All trademarks, logos, product names, text, graphics, and layout on the Website are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or exploit any content without prior written consent from Kure Pharma.
terms-s8-p1: Kure Pharma views protection of your privacy as an important principle. You consent that you have read and understood our
terms-s8-p2: and that the same is acceptable to you.
terms-s9-p1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Kure Pharma shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, punitive, or consequential damages arising from or in connection with the Website or products supplied through it. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the specific order giving rise to the claim, where applicable.
terms-s10-p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts at New Delhi, India. Access to the Website from outside India is at your own risk and you are responsible for compliance with local laws.
terms-s11-p1: For questions regarding these Terms, contact Kure Pharma:
terms-s11-p2: Email: Kure.export@gmail.com | Phone: +91 99119 72234 | Address: H655+4CW, Balbir Saxena Marg, Yusuf Sarai, New Delhi, Delhi 110049, India.
shipping-s1-p1: This Shipping and Delivery Policy explains how Kure Pharma processes, dispatches, and delivers pharmaceutical orders placed through www.kurepharma.com or through our sales/support team. We serve customers across Noida, Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Lucknow, Kolkata, Patna, Chandigarh, and pan-India, subject to product availability and regulatory requirements.
shipping-s2-p1: Orders are processed after enquiry confirmation, prescription verification (where required), licence checks (for institutional buyers), and payment or credit approval as applicable. Processing time is typically 1–3 business days but may take longer for bulk orders, imported medicines, or cold-chain products.
shipping-s2-p2: You will receive confirmation by phone, email, or WhatsApp when your order is accepted and when it is dispatched.
shipping-s3-p1: We deliver across India through approved logistics partners. Estimated timelines after dispatch are indicative only:
shipping-s3-l3: Other locations: 4–10 business days (subject to connectivity and product type)
shipping-s4-p1: Certain oncology injectables, biologics, and critical care medicines require validated cold-chain handling (+2°C to +8°C or as labelled). Such products are packed and shipped using temperature-controlled methods wherever applicable.
shipping-s4-p2: Delivery of cold-chain products may be limited to serviceable locations and may require scheduled delivery. Additional charges may apply.
shipping-s5-p1: Shipping, handling, and cold-chain charges are calculated based on product type, weight, volume, destination, and urgency. Applicable charges are communicated before dispatch. Free or subsidised delivery may be offered on selected bulk or institutional orders at our discretion.
shipping-s6-p1: Where available, tracking details or dispatch confirmation will be shared via email, SMS, or WhatsApp. Tracking activation may take up to 24 hours after handover to the courier.
shipping-s7-p1: You are responsible for providing accurate delivery details. Failed delivery due to incorrect address, unavailability, or refusal to accept may attract re-delivery charges. Risk of loss passes to the buyer upon delivery to the specified address or authorised recipient.
shipping-s8-p1: If your order arrives damaged, incomplete, temperature-compromised (for cold-chain items), or incorrect, notify us within 48 hours of delivery with your order reference and photographs.
shipping-s8-p2: Contact: Kure.export@gmail.com or +91 99119 72234. Claims will be reviewed under our Return & Refund Policy and applicable regulations.
return-s1-p1: Thank you for choosing Kure Pharma. We strive to supply genuine, quality-assured medicines. This Return & Refund Policy explains when returns, replacements, or refunds may be available for products purchased from us.
return-s1-p2: Due to the nature of pharmaceutical products and patient safety regulations, returns are subject to strict conditions and applicable Drugs & Cosmetics rules.
return-s2-p1: A return may be considered only if all of the following conditions are met:
return-s2-l1: Request is raised within seven (7) days of delivery (or as mandated by applicable law)
return-s2-l2: Product is unused, unopened, and in original sealed condition with intact labels and batch details
return-s2-l3: Original invoice, packaging, and documentation are provided
return-s2-l4: Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) is obtained from our team before shipping any item back
return-s3-p1: For safety and regulatory reasons, we generally cannot accept returns of:
return-s3-l1: Opened, used, or partially consumed medicines
return-s3-l2: Temperature-sensitive or cold-chain products that may have been compromised
return-s3-l3: Products nearing expiry or without proper storage proof
return-s3-l4: Items ordered against a valid prescription that cannot be resupplied under law
return-s4-p1: To request a return, email Kure.export@gmail.com or call +91 99119 72234 with your order number, product details, batch number, and reason for return. Our team will issue an RMA number if the return is approved.
return-s4-p2: Do not ship products back without RMA approval. Returns sent without authorization may be refused. Approved returns should be securely packed in original packaging and shipped to the address provided by our team.
return-s5-p1: After receiving and inspecting the returned item, approved refunds or exchanges are typically processed within seven (7) to fourteen (14) business days. Refunds are made to the original payment method where applicable. Bank or payment gateway processing times may vary. We will notify you by email or phone when your return has been processed.
return-s6-p1: If you receive a defective, damaged, or incorrectly supplied product, contact us immediately with photographs and order details. We will arrange inspection and, where appropriate:
return-s6-l3: Refund as per regulatory and commercial terms
return-s7-p1: Returns for hospital, pharmacy, or bulk institutional orders may be governed by separate commercial agreements, credit notes, or manufacturer policies in addition to this policy.
return-s8-p2: Kure Pharma | Kure.export@gmail.com | +91 99119 72234 | H655+4CW, Balbir Saxena Marg, Yusuf Sarai, New Delhi, Delhi 110049, India.
disclaimer-s1-p1: The product catalog on the Kure Pharma ("Kure Pharma", "we", or "us") website www.kurepharma.com has been designed as a quick reference for pharmaceutical products, brand names, and therapeutic categories. Some products—brand or generic—may no longer be available due to discontinuations, stock changes, or regulatory updates. This catalog may not represent our complete portfolio.
disclaimer-s2-p1: Nothing contained on this Website should be construed as medical, legal, investment, financial, or other professional advice. Product information is provided for general reference only and is not intended for prescribing or dispensing purposes.
disclaimer-s2-p2: Patients should always consult a qualified doctor or healthcare provider before starting, stopping, or changing any medication. Kure Pharma does not diagnose conditions or recommend treatment.
disclaimer-s3-p1: We endeavour to keep product descriptions, compositions, strengths, and images accurate; however, packaging, labelling, or manufacturer details may change without notice. Images are for representation. Always refer to the physical product label and package insert before use.
disclaimer-s4-p1: Supply of prescription medicines is subject to applicable Indian laws and valid prescriptions. You acknowledge that:
disclaimer-s4-l1: A substitute medicine may be supplied only if permitted by the prescriber or if the prescription lists salt names instead of a specific brand
disclaimer-s4-l2: Without such permission, a substitute will not be dispensed in place of the prescribed brand
disclaimer-s4-l3: You are responsible for ensuring prescriptions and licences provided are valid and accurate
disclaimer-s5-p1: This Website may link to third-party websites. When you follow such links, you leave Kure Pharma's Website. We are not responsible for content, policies, products, or damages arising from third-party sites.
disclaimer-s6-p1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Kure Pharma disclaims all warranties, express or implied, regarding Website content, including warranties of accuracy, completeness, merchantability, or fitness for a particular purpose. Use of the Website is at your sole risk.
disclaimer-s7-p1: For questions about this Legal Disclaimer or product availability, contact Kure Pharma:
disclaimer-s7-p2: Email: Kure.export@gmail.com | Phone: +91 99119 72234 | Address: H655+4CW, Balbir Saxena Marg, Yusuf Sarai, New Delhi, Delhi 110049, India.
